text.title: two-pass-reason-then-extract Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for two-pass-reason-then-extract as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding a long reasoning field to a strict schema as a substitute for two-pass on math or research tasks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The embedded scratchpad pattern works for medium-difficulty reasoning, but on truly hard tasks the grammar mask still degrades the reasoning trace. When task difficulty saturates the scratchpad, switch to two-pass.

failure-mode.description: Sending the original question plus the full reasoning trace to the extractor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Doubles the extractor's input bill without improving extraction quality — the trace already contains everything the extractor needs. Send only the trace (or the trace plus a one-line task hint).
